title: digitaria pittieri
intro: Digitaria pittieri, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include aiding in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as having antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Digitaria pittieri include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to make medicinal remedies.
